prohibited_paths: unreviewed toolchain installers committed to the repository
preconditions: checked no-claim fresh-host reproduction inventory, run-record template, and fresh-host readiness-review template remain current
fresh reference host or owner-approved clean VM is available
task records exact OS, compiler, SDK, linker, shell, Rust, Cargo, Git, cache, target directory, source-tree cleanliness, and environment facts
all generated caches and build outputs stay outside durable source

checked no-claim fresh-host readiness-review template cannot be cited as owner-reviewed toolchain or fresh-host readiness review, PB-008 or PB-009 readiness, release confidence, production readiness, implementation, or Chrome-class evidence
queue status remains proposed; this specified manifest is non-executable
a named owner and named independent reviewer replace the role placeholders before this manifest can become ready
acceptance_criteria: pinned compiler, SDK, linker, Rust, Cargo, Git, shell, and toolchain manifests are recorded with the accepted evidence location and no-claim boundary
fresh-host reproduction inventory, run-record template, and fresh-host readiness-review record are updated with the accepted evidence location and no-claim boundary
fresh-host bootstrap, doctor, check, and xtask output are recorded with dates, exact compiler, SDK, linker, OS, shell, Rust, Cargo, Git, and host configuration
cache and target-directory behavior is documented and source-tree cleanliness is verified
owner-reviewed toolchain and fresh-host readiness review beyond the checked no-claim fresh-host readiness-review template accepts or rejects PB-008 and PB-009 readiness promotion
owner-reviewed fresh-host readiness review beyond the checked no-claim fresh-host readiness-review template remains required for PB-009; toolchain review is additionally required for PB-008
pre-build readiness and operating board distinguish reproduced evidence from current-host assumptions
validation passes on the repository after the evidence is linked
negative_tests: do not install untracked dependencies into the repository
do not treat same-host reruns as fresh-host reproduction
do not accept an owner-approved clean VM without explicit waiver and expiry
do not promote PB-008 or PB-009 to ready without independent toolchain and reproduction evidence

do not cite the checked no-claim fresh-host readiness-review template as owner-reviewed toolchain or fresh-host readiness review, PB-008 or PB-009 readiness, release confidence, production readiness, implementation, or Chrome-class evidence

rollback.strategy: Remove the reproduction report and revert readiness wording if the run cannot be reproduced.
